autor: but first prepare yourselves to receive yourselves there. It would be madness to trust yourselves to yourselves if you do not know how to control yourselves. There are ways of failing in solitude as well as in company.
explicacao: Citação de but first prepare yourselves to receive yourselves there. It would be madness to trust yourselves to yourselves if you do not know how to control yourselves. There are ways of failing in solitude as well as in company. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Retire within yourselves” articula reflexao, michel-de-montaigne, retire em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
